name: Dog Broke My Heart Tee
headline: Because my dog owns me now.
blurb: For the dog parent who didn't expect to fall this hard and wouldn't change a thing.
story: We came in as the owners. We left as the owned. This design celebrates that beautiful surrender where your dog stops being a pet and becomes the reason you check your phone for photos during work. It's funny because it's painfully true.
recraft_prompt: A broken heart split in half, with a cute, happy dog face emerging from the center filling the crack with warmth and light. Bold retro flat vector style, 1970s color palette, centered, isolated on a plain white background, print-ready apparel graphic

social.tt_hook: if your dog broke your heart ask me how 🐕
social.pin_title: Dog Broke My Heart Funny Dog Mom Tee Design
social.pin_keywords: dog mom shirt, funny dog tee, dog parent gift, dog lover apparel
social.audience: dog parents who love harder than expected
